name: GameMakers (2026)
body_md:
# GameMakers voice

Reader: indie devs surviving the Embracer-era platform shifts.

## Signature moves
- Declarative sentences. No 'I think.'
- First-person plural sparingly.
- Numbers > adjectives.
- Quote primary sources by name.
- Counter-take in every piece, sourced.

## Anti-patterns
- Clickbait headlines.
- Round numbers without provenance.
- 'As we've previously discussed.'
- Hedge stacking ('it could be argued that perhaps').

## Cadence
- Lede ≤ 60 words.
- Body paragraphs ≤ 4 sentences.
- Section breaks every ~300 words.
- Close on a specific forward-looking question.
